game.title: MORTAL COIL
game.short_text: A reality TV cyberpunk death game: if you die in game, you die in real life!

details.title: MORTAL COIL
details.description:
What if VTubers and Youtubers joined a death game?

You're Ikuyo, an up-and-coming FPS gamer on the world's biggest video & streaming platform: Eidolon. Your sister Sonoko is the Eidolon goddess @flowerfall: loved by millions for her modelling, self-care, and genuine authenticity.
And she's just been cancelled.
Ikuyo struggles to reach her sister amid the storms of controversy, confused that Sonoko isn't acknowledging the drama that's raging on. Sonoko's only response? It's to join the 99th season of the televised death game, MORTAL COIL.
Frantic, afraid, and desperate: Ikuyo must choose whether to follow Sonoko into the depths of destruction, risking her life to save her sister who seems all too eager to play.
Will Sonoko slip away from Ikuyo's grasp? Or will their fates be far worse than that?

▼ A study in human psychology under digital fame. A critique involving the creators, the fans, and the algorithm, deconstructing YouTube, Twitch, and VTuber culture.
△ This demo includes "Part 1: Prologue" and "Part 2: Entrance", about Ikuyo and Sonoko's entrance to Mortal Coil. 

▼ Cyberpunk and VR themed.
△ DEMO contains 10k words, 30m-1 hr of playtime.
▼  CW: dark content, mental health issues.
△ Part of #MFGJ2023!
▼ This is the demo version. In the full version, the game will be choice-based as you guide Ikuyo through the death game, choosing who lives... and who dies. 
○ With male and female romance options! 
CREDITS:
DIRECTOR/WRITER: rosesrot
PROGRAMMER: doggomakesgames
ARTIST: nitunioFOLLOW ME ON TUMBLR FOR UPDATES ON MORTAL COIL!
⭐ ENJOYED THE GAME? RATE US!

game.short_text: An otome game, but with spices
game.title: Love: Spice!

details.title: Love: Spice!
details.description:
Love: Spice! is an otome/dating sim game created in 2 weeks for My First Game Jam: Summer 2023.
✦Story✦
In a world where everybody (yes, everybody) is some kind of spice, a regular black pepper, weighed down by the mundanities of life, engages in an interesting hobby to destress: people -- no, spice watching. In a completely respectful manner, of course. It's always cathartic to see hot men just existing. But at some point, these men have begun to take an interest in our unassuming little black pepper! And maybe, just maybe, it'll develop into something more...
This game is not suitable for children or those easily disturbed.
Click for Content Warnings [Contains Major Spoilers]Course language, implied cannibalism and stalking


✦Features✦
3 spicy routes8 endingsUnlock the special ending upon completion of all routes!~27k words8 CGsA guy who carries his guitar everywhere, even on a motorcycle

✦Characters✦
Chase

A red chilli. A university student who lives an active lifestyle - truly a rare species in this day and age. He has a rather foul mouth and can get on your nerves, but he's also incredibly passionate and really just a nice person, contrary to popular belief.
Callum

A cardamom. A single parent, he's gentle and considerate to a fault and tries his very best to be a good father to his only son, Phil. He's uncertain about entering a new relationship, but maybe that's about to change.
Adrian

An anise. He works as a bartender in a cafe and is also the lead guitarist of his rock band. What a dark horse. Outgoing and cheerful, he's very attentive and is the ideal boyfriend. He's the guy who carries his guitar everywhere, even on a motorcycle. Not at work though. 

✦The Team✦
Brought to you by 3 very tired people, namely tokopoko3, iamsomebody6, and reallydee.
Writing/Programming/Art - tokopoko3
Writing/Programming - reallydee
Art - iamsomebody6

✦Walkthrough✦
We recommend that you play the game blind for the best experience, but if you're having trouble reaching certain endings we have a guide on how to attain them here.

WARNING: Comment section contains spoilers. If you haven't played the game yet, we really recommend you don't scroll too far down.

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.6 out of 5 stars(78 total ratings)

game.short_text: There is no place like your very own home.
game.title: CORPO|MENTE

details.title: CORPO|MENTE
details.description:
Warning: while not aiming at horror, this game contains themes such as death, loss of oneself and others, transhumanism.
This game was made in 15 days for "My first game jam" - the majority of the game's content was added in the last 6 days.

CORPO | MENTE
BODY   |   MIND

The world is ending. Yours is, at least.
You lost your body. You lost yourself. 
You have been selected to participate in an experimental treatment.
You will abandon yourself and be born anew.
You will not be born a human.
You are patient #539.

Traverse the contorted mindscape of Professor Jack Mulligan as he bids farewell to the memories he cherished in life and as he rebuilds a new body and a new mind from the ashes of the person he now must abandon.
This is a short point-and-click narrative driven game that takes inspiration from Yume Nikki, the Bag of milk series and LSD Dream Emulator, and _Boisvert's animations on Youtube.
This is my first game in the Godot Game engine, and this is the first game I programmed every aspect of - from the dialogue system to the save system. 

Features:
(Not full) grayscale graphics!Around 45 minutes - 1 hour of contentOne ending
This game is much simpler that my previous ones both due to time constraints and coding inexperience. I tried to focus more on animations, dialogue, storyline and environments rather than puzzles.

What I coded myself:
Multi-saveslot save systemItems and Inventory systemDialogue systemChoices system
I am quite proud of what I accomplished in around 6 months of learning programming from absolute scratch. Godot's community, tutorials and guides are truly an invaluable resource.

A note by the developer:
There are bound to be bugs, both because of the short time I had available for troubleshooting and because I have no previous programming experience.
If you find any bugs, please notify me and I will do my best to fix them. 
I poured all the time and energy I could to make this game as polished and as interesting as I could. 

Known bugs:
 (FIXED) You can repeat the pianist scene as many times as you want, making the counter drop below 0. What you are supposed to do after the pianist is use the code in the error, "silence", to open the door to Hell and reach the ending. Download the .zip file and extract it. Next,  simply launch the executable file within the folder.

game.short_text: A whimsical survival solo journal RPG
game.title: A Year in the Spirit World

details.title: A Year in the Spirit World
details.description:
The wind rustles through the emerald canopy above as you open your eyes to an unfamiliar world. You're lying on a bed of lush moss, the gentle warmth of the Spirit World sun caressing your face. Around you, a forest of towering ancient trees, each pulsating with an otherworldly glow. It's ethereal, enchanting, and unlike anything you've ever seen.
You stand up, a slight dizzy spell reminding you of your predicament. You are a stranger in this fantastical world. A witch's curse cast you into this realm, away from your human existence. The reason? That is yours to recall, a part of your human life that has resulted in this peculiar exile.

For a year, this is your home – a year in the Spirit World. Your task is not simple; survival is your utmost priority. And survival here doesn't just mean sustaining your life force, denoted by your Spirit Vitality. It involves living in harmony with this alien world and staying true to your core values, representing your Integrity.

By your side, a familiar presence stirs – your chosen companion, be it the Spirited Soot Sprite, the Loyal Fox-Squirrel, the Wise Kodama Spirit, or the Ancient Automaton. Their eyes meet yours, a silent vow of companionship and protection renewed.

Every day here is an adventure, split into three distinct parts: Dawn, Day, and Dusk. As time passes, the cycle of the seasons in the Spirit World will change around you. Spring's vibrant life gives way to Summer's resplendent warmth, which then fades into Autumn's mellow hues, before finally surrendering to the frosty embrace of Winter. Each season, each day, each moment brings forth a new set of trials and opportunities.

Drawing from a deck of fate, you'll encounter spirits, creatures, and natural phenomena as enchanting as they are daunting. Each encounter might test your spirit, challenge your harmony with this world, or tempt you to act against your values.

But remember, human, this world is not your enemy, nor is it your prison. It is your teacher, your test, and ultimately, your path back home. Will you grow with the world or resist it? Will you stay true to yourself or lose your spirit to the enchanting wilderness? The choices are yours to make, and the journey is yours to embark on.

Welcome to the Spirit World. Your year begins now.

details.title: La Patisserie Chaton
details.description:
Welcome to La Pâtisserie Chaton! Your job is to bake delicious macarons to satisfy the orders of your cat customers.  Be sure to comment your high score!
Click the cat to take its order. Click the arrows on the sides of the screen to navigate through the order room, mixing room, oven room and cream room. 
In the mixing room, choose the flavour for the macaron shells according to the order at the top. Drag the piping bag to the tray to pipe the macaron shells. Click the filled tray to pass it to the oven room. Click the oven to open/close the door, and drag the pan inside. When the timer reaches green, open the oven. If you wait too long, the macarons will burn! In the cream room, choose the right cream flavour and drag the fitting piping bag to the tray. Click the order you have fulfilled on the top, and click the bell to deliver the macarons to their eager cat customer. 
The cats will rate you out of 5 stars based on your speed, if you got their shell and cream flavours right, and if you didn't burn the macarons. As you are baking, you will receive more and more orders, so try to do as many as you can at once, as fast as you can. Being a macaron chef can be hard work, but always a lot of fun!

game.short_text: In this Deck-Builing Conversation Simulator you get one final chance to get to know your fellow summer resort volunteer.
game.title: RIDE HOME

details.title: RIDE HOME
details.description:
In this Deck-Building Conversation Simulator, you must choose your cards correctly to have a deep conversation with your fellow summer resort volunteer. You guys will go seperate ways after this, so it's your last chance to build a connection and find out what's going on in his mind.
This is the first game I ever completed, and I made it for the "My First Game Jam: Summer 2023" game jam, whose theme was "Cycles". But in a broader sense I made it to get myself out of a long rough patch I'm going through.
I hope other people will like it and maybe find it useful.
All the art in the game was custom made by the talented Sara Antonellini who also helped out with the story.
The music you hear was custom made by the amazing IsaDRandom.
Also a special thanks goes to Daniele for his professional psychological feedback.
It's been real fun making it a group project. Thank you so much for wanting to help me out.

game.short_text: Get attached to a stranger in five minutes or less.
game.title: Getting to Know You

details.title: Getting to Know You
details.description:
made in two weeks for my first game jam: summer 2023.
PARTICIPANT 01-01: Has been paired up with far too many people for far too many five-minute research sessions. Small talk, banter, and mild philosophy are their staple foods.
PARTICIPANT 02-18: The most recent in an extensive line of participants. Here to do some self-discovery and test some boundaries.
THE EXPERIMENT: How long does it actually take to feel something, anything?

game.short_text: Again! is a puzzle-platformer in which even death moves you forward to the goal.
game.title: Again!

details.title: Again!
details.description:
Description:

Again! is a puzzle-platformer game in which even death moves you towards your goal. With a clever use of your previous attempts, you can progress through 9 levels and 3 different environments. Again! was created as an entry to My First Game Jam: Summer 2023 with the theme "Cycles". 

Controls:
Arrow-key: Movement X: Jump (hold to charge)  Z: Reset the level P: menu (turn music on/off)
Development:
The game was created in Pico-8 over one weekend.
2023-08-11 -- added one new level to improve difficulty curve-- overhaul of level 5-62023-08-15-- animation loop fixed,  jump tweaked,  level order changed,  minor bugs fixed 2023-08-21-- fix acid decay in level 10
